basic_details.job_title: CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CSIR-NIO. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR-NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc Marine Science, MSc Oceanography, MSc Physical Oceanography, MSc Space Science and Technology
qualification.details: MSc Marine Science MSc Oceanography MSc Physical Oceanography MSc Space Science and Technology

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
